test.command: bun test --max-concurrency=6 apps/dashboard/src apps/api/src packages/api/src packages/auth/src packages/db/src packages/env/src

typecheck.command: bun run check-types && bun x tsc -p apps/dashboard/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/auth/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p packages/env/tsconfig.json --noEmit

lint.command: bun x ultracite check apps/dashboard/src apps/api/src packages/api/src packages/auth/src packages/db/src packages/env/src

blockingIssues.description: The fix removes the ignored `packages/api/node_modules/drizzle-orm` symlink workaround and reroutes the API predicate imports through `@faworra-new/db`, but `bun.lock` still records `drizzle-orm` as a direct `packages/api` dependency even though `packages/api/package.json` no longer declares it.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `.factory/library/validation.md` documenting that the current shared validator contract does not check workspace manifest ↔ `bun.lock` consistency and that dependency-seam changes must keep both in sync.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either relax the mandatory `midday-reference` invocation requirement for narrow runtime/validator normalization work, or enforce required skill-invocation checks before workers can mark `followedProcedure: true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both completed preflight-structure implementation reviews (`preflight-disable-polar-runtime-blockers` and `scoped-validator-and-dev-contract-normalization`) reported that the worker sessions did not invoke `midday-reference` even though the skill requires it, and the handoffs still claimed procedure compliance.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repeated `midday-reference` compliance observation from the second review.
README still lists `POLAR_*` vars as required for local API boot.
